verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How beautiful Are you Lord It's your word It's your love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: How glorious Are you Lord It's your power It was a cross

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: That saved me, and rescued me Just a moment there you set me free

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: I give you glory, glory I give you glory, glory Jesus. :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: With the crown of thorns You became my came forever :/
